text: Inside this glass-walled room, awash with the promise of innovation—'R+D', research and development bright on the wall—I feel a quiet anticipation. Ideas swirl in the air, whispering of progress, as if every display and screen is an invitation to discover what it means to live alongside technology. This environment, so deliberately arranged, makes me conscious of humanity’s restless nature, always reaching to understand and improve. I feel a mixture of excitement and humility, as though I am both a witness to and participant in the evolution of thinking.
